subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! The letter which thou didst write from Khurasan to Jinab-i-Siyyid Taqi was noted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان مکتوبی که از خراسان بجناب سید تقی مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
